The number one cause of death is heart disease, and February is a month to remember to take care of yourself and care for others who might be suffering. This is very important to me personally because in April of 2024, my dad had a heart attack. He’s fine and living, but heart disease and heart attacks can take a life at a moment's notice. So until February 19th (the day before Friday the 20th, when I will be running miles), I will be raising money to donate to heart-related charities. On February 20th, I’ll hold an event for everyone, and anyone who donated 20 USD ~ 150 RMB to a heart-related charity can contribute to my suffering. Donating isn’t for everyone, and I get that, so the second way to contribute will be to walk or run 10 miles (16km) and send me proof (treadmill/strava/other tracking app) that they cumulatively met the requirements. I will run/move until I meet the number of miles contributed. The event will be held at 9 AM on Friday, the 20th, as I start to run around campus (starting from ccte). All are welcome to attend the event and can join me running, help out with time spent running, or distract me from the pain that running tons and tons of miles will bring. I hope you’re willing to donate or start running to save someone else’s cardiovascular health, or your own!

[2026-02-17 13:56] Mason Swayne 苏梅森: Join RA Mason in Cardio for a Cause! February is Heart Month. The number one cause of death is heart disease, and February is a month to remember to take care of yourself and care for others who might be suffering. This is very important to me personally because in April of 2024, my dad had a heart attack. He’s fine and living, but heart disease and heart attacks can take a life at a moment's notice. So until February 19th (the day before Friday the 20th, when I will be running miles), I will be raising money to donate to heart-related charities. On February 20th, I’ll hold an event for everyone, and anyone who donated 20 USD ~ 150 RMB to a heart-related charity can contribute to my suffering. Donating isn’t for everyone, and I get that, so the second way to contribute will be to walk or run 10 miles (16km) and send me proof (treadmill/strava/other tracking app) that they cumulatively met the requirements. I will run/move until I meet the number of miles contributed. The event will be held at 9 AM on Friday, the 20th, as I start to run around campus (starting from ccte). All are welcome to attend the event and can join me running, help out with time spent running, or distract me from the pain that running tons and tons of miles will bring. I hope you’re willing to donate or start running to save someone else’s cardiovascular health, or your own!

[2026-02-12 14:27] Mason Swayne 苏梅森: Join RA Mason in Cardio for a Cause! February is Heart Month. The number one cause of death is heart disease, and February is a month to remember to take care of yourself and care for others who might be suffering. This is very important to me personally because in April of 2024, my dad had a heart attack. He’s fine and living, but heart disease and heart attacks can take a life at a moment's notice. So until February 19th (the day before Friday the 20th, when I will be running miles), I will be raising money to donate to heart-related charities. On February 20th, I’ll hold an event for everyone, and anyone who donated 20 USD ~ 150 RMB to a heart-related charity can contribute to my suffering. Donating isn’t for everyone, and I get that, so the second way to contribute will be to walk or run 10 miles (16km) and send me proof (treadmill/strava/other tracking app) that they cumulatively met the requirements. I will run/move until I meet the number of miles contributed. The event will be held at 9 AM on Friday, the 20th, as I start to run around campus (starting from ccte). All are welcome to attend the event and can join me running, help out with time spent running, or distract me from the pain that running tons and tons of miles will bring. I hope you’re willing to donate or start running to save someone else’s cardiovascular health, or your own!
